clinical_blockers: Adult undifferentiated rash, mucosal involvement, drug eruptions, generalized blistering or peeling, sick contacts, wound fields, bloods, swabs, fixed one-week timing, and many diagnosis-specific treatments remain unsupported.
Contact dermatitis or eczema remains clinician-stated and the broad workflow must not infer anaphylaxis from skin findings alone.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
